mapper.select: SELECT ak.id, ak.agent_id, ak.knowledge_id, ak.enabled, ak.retrieval_count, ak.sort_order, ak.created_at, kb.name AS knowledge_name FROM ai_agent_knowledge ak LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge kb ON ak.knowledge_id = kb.id WHERE ak.agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY ak.sort_order ASC, ak.created_at ASC

SELECT ak.id, ak.agent_id, ak.knowledge_id, ak.enabled, ak.retrieval_count, ak.sort_order, ak.created_at, kb.name AS knowledge_name FROM ai_agent_knowledge ak LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge kb ON ak.knowledge_id = kb.id WHERE ak.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_agent_knowledge WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_knowledge (agent_id, knowledge_id, enabled, retrieval_count, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{enabled}, #{retrievalCount}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
